name: Ballet Dance Fundamentals VR
summary: 🌿 Ballet Dance Fundamentals VR — Hands-Free Training  Learn classical ballet through structured VR practice using full hand tracking—no controllers needed. Follow a 3D instructor, study movements from any angle, and use motion trails to replicate each step with precision. Includes beginner to advanced levels with nearly 100 movements and guided sequences. Train with discipline and move with grace.
